title: Support signals of packed arrays of packed types

features.name: packed array of enum element type
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration with an enum element type inside a packed array dimension
features.snippet:
typedef enum {A, B, C} my_enum_t;
my_enum_t data[3:0];

features.name: packed array of vector element type
features.description: Code should include a signal declaration with a vector element type inside a packed array dimension

features.name: packed array of packed array
features.description: Code should include a nested packed array declaration where the element type is itself a packed array

features.name: invalid packed dimensions error handling
features.description: Code should include a packed array with invalid packed dimensions that triggers an elaboration error instead of a crash
